name: understoria
description: Understoria — a federated, privacy-first mutual aid timebank

scripts.dev: npm run shared:build && npm --workspace @understoria/web run dev
scripts.dev:server: npm run shared:build && npm --workspace @understoria/server run dev
scripts.build: npm run shared:build && npm --workspace @understoria/web run build
scripts.build:server: npm run shared:build && npm --workspace @understoria/server run build
scripts.test: npm run shared:build && npm --workspaces --if-present run test
scripts.typecheck: npm run shared:build && npm --workspaces --if-present run typecheck
